name: Seeed Studio MR60BHA2 60GHz mmWave Breathing and Heartbeat Detection Sensor Kit
description: The `seeed_mr60bha2` platform allows you to use Seeed Studio MR60BHA2 60GHz mmWave Fall Detection Sensor Kit with XIAO ESP32C6 ([Product Page](https://www.seeedstudio.com/MR60BHA2-60GHz-mmWave-Sensor-Breathing-and-Heartbeat-Module-p-5945.html)) with ESPHome.

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [UART Component](https://esphome.io/components/uart) if you want to use multiple UART buses.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this [Seeed Mr60Bha2](https://esphome.io/components/seeed_mr60bha2/) component if you need multiple components.
